# Off Premise Catering — Midterm Project

React + Vite application for Off Premise Catering and Café Sabor.

## Project Structure (Generated by Claude)
```
6750MidTerm/
├── backend/              ← JSON Server backend (run separately)
│   ├── db.json           ← Product and order data
│   ├── package.json
│   └── README.md
├── frontend/
│   ├── public/
│   │   └── images/       ← Product and gallery images
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── components/
│   │   │   ├── Layout/   ← TopBar, NavBar, Footer, Layout
│   │   │   ├── Home/     ← Home page
│   │   │   ├── About/    ← About page
│   │   │   ├── Shop/     ← ProductCard, Shop, ProductDetail
│   │   │   ├── Menu/     ← Menu, MenuSection, OrderSummary
│   │   │   └── Cart/     ← Cart, Checkout
│   │   ├── store/
│   │   │   └── CartContext.jsx
│   │   ├── data/
│   │   │   └── menuData.js
│   │   ├── App.jsx
│   │   └── main.jsx
│   └── package.json
└── Explanation.md
```

## How to Run

**Step 1 — Start the backend (in one terminal):**

npm install
npm start

**Step 2 — Start the React app (in another terminal):**

npm install
npm run dev

The app will be at http://localhost:5173
The API will be at http://localhost:3001
